query:
CREATE TABLE `vaccination_records` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`animalId` int NOT NULL,
	`vaccineId` int NOT NULL,
	`vaccinationDate` date NOT NULL,
	`nextDueDate` date,
	`batchNumber` varchar(50),
	`notes` text,
	`veterinarian` varchar(100),
	`isCompleted` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`createdBy` int,
	`deletedAt` timestamp,
	`deletedBy` int,
	CONSTRAINT `vaccination_records_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `vaccination_records_animalId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`animalId`) REFERENCES `animals`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
	CONSTRAINT `vaccination_records_vaccineId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`vaccineId`) REFERENCES `vaccines`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
CREATE TABLE `vaccines` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`validityPeriod` int NOT NULL,
	`validityUnit` enum('days','months') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'days',
	`boosterRequired` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`boosterInterval` int,
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`createdBy` int,
	`deletedAt` timestamp,
	`deletedBy` int,
	CONSTRAINT `vaccines_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `vaccines_name_unique` UNIQUE(`name`)
);
ALTER TABLE `animals` ADD CONSTRAINT `animals_ownerId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`ownerId`) REFERENCES `owners`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL;
